hero.kicker: Our little one is on the way!

scratch.title: Boy or Girl?

reveal.p: The real reveal happens at the party — with cake! 🎂

gifts.title: No gifts, please
gifts.body: Your presence is the greatest gift we could ask for. Please — no gifts. Just bring your love and excitement! 💛

footer.line1: made with 🐝 + 💛 for our little one
